display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Tablet of Truth
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Tablet of Truth.png}} {{E|Tablet of Truth|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Smash}} Heal {{TS|positive||20}} HP.
{{Frame|Decipher}} Lose {{TS|negative||3}} Max HP. {{KW|Upgrade|{{TS|gold||Upgrade}}|2}} a random card. * If Decipher is chosen, additional stages follow with escalating costs: ** Stage 2: Lose {{TS|negative||6}} Max HP. {{KW|Upgrade|{{TS|gold||Upgrade}}|2}} a random card. ** Stage 3: Lose {{TS|negative||12}} Max HP. {{KW|Upgrade|{{TS|gold||Upgrade}}|2}} a random card. ** Stage 4: Lose {{TS|negative||24}} Max HP. {{KW|Upgrade|{{TS|gold||Upgrade}}|2}} a random card. ** Stage 5: Lose {{TS|negative||[all but 1]}} Max HP. {{KW|Upgrade|{{TS|gold||Upgrade}}|2}} ALL cards in your deck. * {{Frame|Give Up}} can be chosen at any stage to leave. == Dialogue ==
You defeat a pair of {{TS|blue||Guardian Kin}} and make your way into a protected vault. Inside is a {{TS|purple||tablet with familiar inscriptions}}. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in. The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its {{TS|green||healing energies}} instead.
{{Frame|Smash}}
The tablet is {{TS|red||smashed to pieces}}, energy expelled from the tablet seeps into your body. {{TS|green||You feel refreshed!}}
{{Frame|Decipher}}
As you begin deciphering the tablet, the {{TS|blue||Kin's Mantra}} speaks to you. "The {{TS|gold||Truth}} is everything..."
{{Frame|Continue (Stage 2)}}
You feel faint from all this reading! {{TS|purple||Heroes weren't meant to read for such an extended period of time...}}
{{Frame|Continue (Stage 3)}}
{{TS|red||You're barely holding on...}} The tablet is nearly deciphered. The {{TS|blue||Mantra}} holds the truth... THE TRUTH!! WHAT IS THE TRUTH!?
{{Frame|Continue (Stage 4)}}
In a trance, you decipher the remaining text, abandoning mind and body. {{TS|purple||The spiritual pursuit of the {{TS|gold||Truth}} is all that matters.}} Or does it? One final word remains... It will cost everything.
{{Frame|Continue (Stage 5)}}
{{TS|red||Everything was spent}} to decipher the {{TS|gold||Final Word}} and you black out... When you come to, you realize something is etched into the floor. '''"Air"'''
{{Frame|Give Up}}
You stop all this reading and deciphering. Your body normalizes, though you can't help but wonder what the {{TS|gold||Truth}} was.
